candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to the exact total line.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet cash line with reported values; appears to represent cash excluding restricted cash.
Generic cash label but no reported values in preview; less useful than the populated cash line.
Restricted cash should generally be excluded from cash and cash equivalents.
Restricted cash/withheld taxes should be excluded from cash and cash equivalents.
Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet cash line and excluded restricted cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best direct match for short-term debt/current portion of debt; excludes lease liabilities because those are separately disclosed.
Could include lease maturities and other liabilities; broader and less clean than current interest-bearing debt.
Potential component of short-term debt, but appears empty and likely not the main reported STD line.

variables.notes: Chose a cleaner direct debt total outside the shortlist. Excluded lease liabilities per instruction since 'Current leasing liabilities' is separate.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Also a direct match; appears in some years and may reflect label variation over time.

variables.notes: Both labels are valid tax payable/current tax liability labels and may vary across years.

candidates.why: Best reported total for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets; preferable to gross/component lines.
Gross tangible assets is less preferred than net total for PPEGT.
Only a component, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Preferred reported net total tangible assets as the closest PPE total.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but this is the clear operating cash flow line.
